item.title: Aitzaz Hasan
item.description: January 6th is in a few days, marking this hero's anniversary for his sacrifice. Imgur promised to never forget.
item.dc:creator: senyu

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
nope
yes
hyper karen cut
if you're lucky
what could go wrong?
mmm hmm
sort of?
deodor... DAMNIT
we've all been there
alright
clearly
i guess
what will they think of next? wow
no need to brag
as is tradition
i could only be so lucky
that's my time.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: xbadxfaeriex

item.title: What's the most boomer complaint you have?
item.dc:creator: ProblemQueen7

item.title: Sometimes life does suck
item.description:
Step dad stopped taking dialysis this last Saturday. He wanted to end it because he was just tired of pain and exhaustion. My mom lives an hour away where he was for hospice and I live twenty minutes away so I raced over. Within the hour he passed away while I was holding his hand. My wife and kids are at home and I felt I needed to have a beer in his honor. Of course I’m sad but also glad he isn’t in pain anymore.
Good bye Dad
item.dc:creator: landofentrapment

item.title: Well that aged fast.
item.description:
Elon threatened to sue media outlets for not making it clear that the Las Vegas Cybertruck explosion was caused by external factors, and not the vehicle itself, which according to Musk, "has never happened before". (LOL) Fast forward to literally one day later...
https://www.irishstar.com/news/us-news/tesla-elon-musk-fire-again-34415731.amp Welp!
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

item.title: "Just Cant Win" felt in the soul
item.description: After getting hyped up and re-energized by you wonderful people, I ended up posting a (relatively) recent piece featuring a pretty ferret lady in office attire, and two additional versions of herself at different stages of life, wearing sweaters and knee-length skirts. I understand that a lot of mod work is done by auto-mods from reports, but man, does this take the wind out of my sails... Ain't gonna stop me though, hopefully my appeal goes through. Stay well, cheese bags! Love ya all!
item.dc:creator: ScalieMistake

item.description:
Man removes a can from a fox head
2 :: Dice Stacking -- is this real ?
I always wondered how people picked berries manually, this makes complete sense
4 :: The way ice comes out of this hose
Woman in Argentina stops phone robbery
6 :: The way to get space
Swan carrying signets on her back
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: Sophie's choice... and getting 100k from Tesla
item.description: "Dismissal without real and serious cause": a French employee wins her standoff against Tesla Sophie, a product specialist at Tesla France, was dismissed for economic reasons in 2020. A decision considered abusive by the industrial tribunal in 2022. The Versailles Court of Appeal has just confirmed and ordered Tesla to pay her more than 100,000 euros. (=$103,100) See? that's what happens when a country's Judicial system is here to protect the workers.
item.dc:creator: Poppypoppoppop

item.title: The best surprise I’ve found in my bed in a long time
item.description: My little Houdini kitty just made my night. I hope you all have something warm and comfy to snuggle with tonight. Sleep well, everyone!

item.title: So I did a thing…
item.description: So I did a thing after many many years and came out of the closet. Was super scared and now idk why. I mean my dad disowned me but fuck that guy anyways am I right?
